samaMethodBody:
The Sama Method is a human-centered approach to teaching yoga.

Rooted in the wisdom of yoga philosophy and informed by modern movement science, you'll learn far more than poses and sequencing. You'll develop the observation, communication, and teaching skills to adapt to the individual and confidently guide Vinyasa, Open Level, Yin Flow, Meditation, and Accessible Yoga.

We believe great teachers do more than instruct movement.

They see the person in front of them.

This is the heart of the Sama Method.
whatsIncluded: Opportunity to register with Yoga Alliance® as a Certified Yoga Instructor
introBody:
Learn to Teach the Person, Not Just the Pose.

Develop the skills to teach yoga with confidence through anatomy, philosophy, breathwork, movement science, and individualized mentorship. The Sama Method prepares you to meet students where they are and guide meaningful experiences in any setting.

200-Hour Yoga Alliance Registered Teacher Training

reviews.author: Megan
reviews.quote: I joined this YTT with the intention of deepening my personal practice, and I ended up gaining so much more than I expected. Beyond learning about yoga, the training offered meaningful opportunities for self-reflection and growth that extended into other areas of my life. I felt genuinely supported by both the instructors and my fellow trainees, and appreciated how flexible and accessible the program was. It provided a strong foundation in yoga philosophy, cueing, and thoughtful sequencing, with a clear emphasis on creating classes that are inclusive, welcoming, and responsive to different bodies and experiences. Over the course of the training, I began to see potential in myself as a teacher that I hadn’t anticipated when I first started. I now feel equipped with both the confidence and the practical tools to share this practice with others in a way that feels authentic and grounded.

reviews.author: Laura
reviews.quote: A truly transformative experience. Fascinating, deeply instructive, and held in a beautiful, welcoming, and supportive environment. Rebekah is an exceptional teacher and leader. She guided us with such grace and care, creating space for our own individual journeys to unfold naturally. I highly recommend this yoga academy to anyone looking to deepen their practice.

reviews.author: Nathalie
reviews.quote: I loved my teacher training program at Sama with Rebekah! It is so informative and she makes the material digestible as it is A LOT. I appreciate the booklet she creates for the teacher training; it is very clear. I also appreciate her help in continuing my learning with a mentor and opportunities to practice teach. I highly recommend the program!

reviews.author: Jennifer D.
reviews.quote: The program was an absolutely joy. Rebekah is the consummate teacher, I couldn’t have asked for a better experience. It has opened doors to new paths personally and professionally. I am eternally grateful and would recommend anyone who is curious about this training and/or Sama’s practice to not delay and reach out, you won’t be disappointed.

reviews.author: Mayela
reviews.quote: The material, guidance and heartfelt empathy provided by Sama Yoga Center and specially by Rebekah, made this experience truly invaluable and deeply transformative.

reviews.author: Kari
reviews.quote: This training was incredibly organized, comprehensive, and heartfelt. I learned more than I could have ever hoped. I couldn’t recommend Sama enough.

reviews.author: Becky
reviews.quote: The program includes opportunities for take-home readings and self-practice, complemented by in-studio discussions, peer connections, and co-teaching experiences. Enrolling in the program gives you access to a comprehensive handbook, unlimited classes at Sama, and an online library of additional content, including text and videos. It’s a balanced and supportive approach to learning, fostering both personal and professional growth as a yoga instructor.

reviews.author: Zach
reviews.quote: Rebekah’s knowledge, care and professionalism create one of the most wholistic and nurturing educational environments I have ever experienced. The program is thorough, individualized, and touches upon all fundamental and experiential concepts that go into guiding and facilitating a yoga practice.

faqs.question: How much experience do I need?
faqs.answer: We recommend about one year of consistent yoga practice before beginning teacher training—but you don't need to be advanced or especially flexible. The Sama Method is designed for every body and every level. Students arrive with a wide range of backgrounds, and we meet you where you are, helping you modify, adapt, and build knowledge, confidence, and teaching skills one step at a time.

faqs.question: What if I want to do this for myself and I'm not sure I want to teach?
faqs.answer: You're in wonderful company. Many students join to deepen their personal practice, cultivate a meditation practice, gain confidence, and connect with a like-minded community. Whether you teach or not, this training is designed to enrich your life.

faqs.question: Is this training accredited?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sama Academy is a Yoga Alliance® Registered Yoga School (RYS 200). Upon successful completion of the program, you may register with Yoga Alliance as a Registered Yoga Teacher (RYT 200).

faqs.question: Will I feel prepared to teach?
faqs.answer: Yes. Throughout the program you'll receive progressive teaching opportunities, individualized feedback, and personal mentorship. You'll graduate with the confidence to teach safely, communicate clearly, and create meaningful experiences.

faqs.question: Can I teach at a hot yoga studio after graduation?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. While our training takes place in a comfortable room with gently warmed floors, you'll learn principles that translate beautifully to both heated and non-heated environments. Your education prepares you to teach with confidence wherever your path leads.

faqs.question: Can I attend from home?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer a live online training option, allowing you to participate from home while remaining fully connected to the group. You'll interact with faculty and fellow trainees in real time, ask questions, receive personalized feedback, and enjoy the same curriculum and mentorship as our in-person students.

faqs.question: Can I watch the recordings instead of attending live?
faqs.answer: The heart of the Sama Method is learning together. Whether you attend in person or online, participation happens live so you can ask questions, receive individualized guidance, and practice teach with confidence. Online students join via Zoom with cameras on to create an engaging, supportive learning environment. If life requires you to miss a session, let us know. Recordings are available for review and make-up purposes, and we'll help you stay on track.

faqs.question: Where do the 200 hours come from?
faqs.answer:
A 200-hour teacher training includes much more than classroom instruction. The Sama Method is thoughtfully designed for modern life, blending in-person learning with guided home study, personal practice, observation, reflection, reading, written assignments, practice teaching, unlimited yoga classes, and one-on-one mentorship.

You'll integrate your learning over time—to create layered understanding, strong teaching skills, and lasting confidence.

faqs.question: What happens if I miss a weekend?
faqs.answer: Life happens. We record the portions of training that are appropriate for review, and we'll work with you to create a plan so you feel supported and confident before moving forward.

faqs.question: How many students are in each training?
faqs.answer: We intentionally keep our trainings small to create a supportive learning environment where every student receives individualized feedback, mentorship, and meaningful opportunities to practice teach.

faqs.question: Do I need to purchase classes?
faqs.answer: No. Unlimited yoga classes are included from the day you register through graduation. There are no required class packages or additional membership costs.

faqs.question: Do I need to purchase books or materials?
faqs.answer: No. Your tuition includes a comprehensive training manual, recorded lectures, and all required learning materials. We provide a recommended reading list and have many of the books available to borrow if you'd like to explore further.

faqs.question: How much does the training cost?
faqs.answer: Tuition is $3,500, with flexible payment plans available. Your investment includes everything needed to complete the program, with no surprise fees or required add-on purchases.

graduationRequirements.requirement: Attend training modules or watch recordings
Complete 50 yoga or meditation sessions (at least 30 with Sama)
Submit and teach a prepared sequence
Complete an open-book exam at your own pace
